It is true that all doctors spend a great deal of time in the classroom. Dr. Rezvani attended the University of Maryland, Baltimore, and then continued on to receive his Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) degree from the same school. He completed a General Dentistry Residency at Brigham & Women’s Hospital and Harvard Medical and Dental School in 1996 followed by his Oral Surgery Internship at Kings County Hospital in Brooklyn, New York.
